query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(description, '-', 3) as descPrefix,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) as customers
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE 'ST-%'
GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(description, '-', 3)
ORDER BY customers DESC
